title: Central Monitoring & Telemetry
subtitle: Vital signs monitoring organized by wings and rooms protected by duty passcode
restrictedRoomDesc: This wing contains protected clinical data (HIPAA/LGPD). Enter the duty scale passcode for {{roomName}} to release telemetry.
clinicalCouncil: Technical Council of Nursing and Intensive Care Medicine
noBeds: No active beds in this monitoring room.
noBedSelectedDesc: Select a bed in the side list to monitor vital signs in real time and inject clinical simulations.

toast.unlockError: Incorrect passcode. Verify the duty scale.
